word: H4591 - מָעַט - mâʻaṭ - maw-at' - Suffer to decrease

sections.paragraph:
Original: מעט

Transliteration: mâ‛aṭ

Phonetic: maw-at'

BDB Definition:

  1. to be or become small, be few, be diminished
    1. (Qal)
      1. to diminish
      2. to be too small
    2. (Piel) to become few
    3. (Hiphil)
      1. to make small, make few, diminish
      2. to give less

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1228

Part(s) of speech: Verb
